headline: Diesel Above $5 For The First Time Since 2022: Goldman Warns The Real Energy Crisis Isn't Crude
summary: Diesel prices top $5 for the first time since 2022 as crack spreads approach $64 per barrel. Goldman Sachs warns refined fuels—not crude—are driving the energy shock.

headline: Geopolitically Themed Investment Risks And Opportunities Take Center Stage
summary: Geopolitics and ever-changing macroeconomic forecasts have driven markets more than underlying fundamentals in the past six weeks. There has also been a lot of sector and industry rotation.

raw.headline: Geopolitically Themed Investment Risks And Opportunities Take Center Stage

headline: Diesel prices surge to $5 per gallon, highest since 2022, as Iran war disrupts global oil supplies
summary: Fuel prices are likely to keep rising until crude oil flows through the Strait of Hormuz return to normal.

headline: Treasury yields edge lower as investors weigh rising oil price, Iran attacks and looming Fed decision
summary: Treasury yields edged lower as investors weighed mounting tensions in the Middle East and rising oil prices ahead of the Federal Reserve's policy decision.
